CONTENT.Honours: Bayern MunichBundesliga: 2018–19UEFA Champions League: 2019–20FIFA Club World Cup: 2020SunderlandEFL League One play-offs: 2022
CONTENT.Club career: Hoffmann made his 3. Liga debut for Bayern Munich II on 30 July 2019, starting in the away match against Hansa Rostock.On 31 August 2021, he was loaned to Sunderland AFC for the 2021-22 season.  Prior to the loan move, Hoffmann signed a one-year contract extension to keep him with FC Bayern through 2023.On 15 June 2022, Bayern Munich announced Hoffmann's departure as he would be transferred to recently promoted 2. Bundesliga club Eintracht Braunschweig, for a reported €300,000 fee.On 31 May 2024, Hoffmann moved to Schalke 04 on a free transfer, signing a three-year contract.
CONTENT.External links: Profile at the Schalke 04 websiteRon-Thorben Hoffmann at DFB (also available in German)Ron-Thorben Hoffmann at SoccerwayRon-Thorben Hoffmann at kicker (in German)Ron-Thorben Hoffmann – UEFA competition record (archive)
CONTENT.International career: Hoffmann made two appearances for the German under-18 national team in 2016, debuting at half-time in a friendly match against the Republic of Ireland on 13 November 2016.

SUMMARY: Ron-Thorben Hoffmann (born 4 April 1999) is a German professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for 2. Bundesliga club Schalke 04.
